description: You are an interior designer for a heritage railway company drafting the general arrangement for a new luxury sleeper car (similar to the Orient Express) in the provided Sweet Home 3D project. The carriage shell is 25 meters long by 3.5 meters wide. Design the interior layout to include a continuous side corridor, three private sleeper suites, and a rear observation lounge. Each suite must feature an enclosed bathroom. Install access doors between the corridor and suites, and between suites and bathrooms (minimum 6 doors total). Furnish each suite with a bed or sleeper-sofa and storage, each bathroom with a toilet and sink, and the lounge with at least four seating items and a bar or table. Document the corridor walking clearance with at least two dimension lines. Save the completed project.
